notes: Always pay the required Connects if the job itself is worth applying to and required Connects are under the hard cap.
For boosted proposals, aim to stay top three when possible.
Ideal boost range is 10-30 Connects if that gets us into the top three.
Anything above 50 Connects is too high by default.
If the first/top bid is around 100 Connects, skip rather than waste Connects.
Never bid max automatically. Require human judgment for expensive boosts.
